name.description: Human-readable preset name shown in the bootstrap wizard.

description.description: One-line description of the intended customer.

default_principle_domains.description: Domain tags the principle extractor will preferentially attach. These are HINTS to the LLM, not a closed set.

seed_artifacts.description: Empty directories the bootstrap CLI creates under the tenant's data dir, each with a README explaining what to drop there.

modules.description: Module-enable flags. The preset is opinionated, not locked — a tenant can flip any flag back on later.

decision_surface.description: UI layout opinion. The bootstrap writes this into the tenant config so the sidebar primaries/secondaries/hidden routes follow it.

primary.description: Route the daily-driver page lands on after login.

adjacent.description: Routes shown next to the primary in the sidebar.
